title: Pils: sharper and drier
summary: German Pils is still pale, but hops speak more clearly than in Helles.

signals.title: Bitterness
signals.body: The finish is drier and more assertive.

signals.title: Aroma
signals.body: Floral or herbal hop notes are common.

signals.title: Body
signals.body: The malt base supports rather than leads.

signals.title: Use
signals.body: It works when you want crisp refreshment.

guardrails.title: Do not flatten
guardrails.body: Keep it distinct from generic pale lager.

guardrails.title: Hop cue
guardrails.body: Herbal bitterness is the useful signal.
